rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BARBARA KASOFF
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Petitioner requests that a determination that Decedent's ½ interest in real property known as 44-48 San Antonio Place passes to him without administration. Petitioner has not provided legal authority for the court to make a determination that real property that is the subject of a pour over will (to be distributed to a trust) can pass to spouse via spousal property petition.
